preregistered_gates.H1: exact spectral identity: the v=0 coefficient of |f_Q|^4 (O(N^4) quadruple count) equals E_+(Q) (pair-sum count); integer equality, no tolerance
preregistered_gates.H2: Besicovitch convergence: |avg_S/(int w) - E_+|/E_+ < 1e-3 at S=80 AND decays by >= 30x from S=5 to S=80 (envelope ~S^{-2}); failure falsifies the Lemma R1 limit step
preregistered_gates.H3: Minkowski step: the L^2(dy) triangle inequality used in Lemma R1 holds on 200 random nonnegative trials (sanity of the inequality direction)

lemma: R1 bridge: lim_S avg_{B_S} ||f_Q||^4_{L^4(w(.-y))} dy = (int w) E_+(Q), exact for finite Q (trig polynomial); + Minkowski step

claims.name: H1_c0_equals_Eplus_exact
claims.detail: (v=0 quadruple count == pair-sum E_+ exactly, and sum_v c_v == N^4, on both configs: the spectral identity behind M(|f_Q|^4) = E_+)

claims.name: H2_besicovitch_convergence
claims.detail: (closed-form avg_S -> (int w) E_+ with the predicted ~S^{-2} envelope on both configs; final relative errors: generic_with_quadruple:1.80e-05, rich_latitude_z2:2.31e-05)
